calendar.matters:
Petition Of Co-Trustee And Beneficiary To Remove Co-Trustee And For Payment Of Fees
Off Calendar Jun-05-2013 Off Calendar

Petition Of Co-Trustee And Beneficiary To Remove Co-Trustee And For Payment Of Fees
Off Calendar Apr-24-2013 Continued To Jun-05-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Dennis Vann for John Walker. Arthur Park for Sandra Johnson.

Mr. Vann reported that they concluded mediation last Monday, that they reached a figure for one beneficiary to buy out the other one and that they were giving her thirty days to obtain funding. Mr. Park confirmed that what was stated by Mr. Vann is true and explained that they are working with a lender. The Petition to remove Co-Trustee, etc. was continued to June 5, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John Dearman. Clerk: Nancy Bautista/Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Whitehead.

Petition Of Co-Trustee And Beneficiary To Remove Co-Trustee And For Payment Of Fees
Off Calendar Apr-03-2013 Continued To Apr-24-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition Of Co-Trustee And Beneficiary To Remove Co-Trustee And For Payment Of Fees
Off Calendar Jan-09-2013 Continued To Apr-03-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Dennis Vann for and with John Walker Jr. (Petitioner). Arthur Park for and with Sandra Johnson (Respondent).

Mr. Vann stated that they have been trying to settle the matter for about one year, that the property was appraised and that Mr. Park's Client made an offer to purchase his Client's share. In addition, Mr. Vann stated that Ms. Johnson has been living in the property exclusively, that one of them needs to buy the other out, that a partion action needs to be filed or that an evidentiary hearing needs to be set. Mr. Park stated that his Client is trying to sell property in Georgia and suggested mediation. Mr. Vann also explained that Ms. Johnson owns 75% of the property and that Mr. Walker owns 25%. The Parties agreed to participate in mediation (order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation signed in open Court). Mediation is to be completed by March 29, 2013. The Parties are to report to the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by March 29, 2013. The Petition of Co-Trustee and Beneficiary to Remove Co-Trustee and for Payment of Fees was continued to April 3, 2013 at 9:00 a.m, in Dept. 204 for status on mediation.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Whitehead.

Petition Of Co-Trustee And Beneficiary To Remove Co-Trustee And For Payment Of Fees
Off Calendar Dec-05-2012 Continued To Jan-09-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition Of Co-Trustee And Beneficiary To Remove Co-Trustee And For Payment Of Fees
Off Calendar Oct-10-2012 Continued To Dec-05-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Dennis Vann for Petitioner.

Mr. Vann stated that they settled the case, that the property was appraised, that Mr. Parks Client (Sandra Johnson) wants to purchase his Client's (John Walker) interest and that Ms. Johnson is shopping for a loan. Mr. Vann also suggested continuing the matter for 60-days and stated that if she can't obtain financing, that the property will need to be sold. Furthermore, Mr. Vann stated that Ricky's Children do not take his share. The Petition to Remove Co-Trustee, etc. was continued to December 5, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Gomez.

Petition Of Co-Trustee And Beneficiary To Remove Co-Trustee And For Payment Of Fees
Off Calendar Jan-18-2012 Continued To Mar-28-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Arthur Park for Sandra Johnson.

The Petition to Remove Co-Trustee was continued to March 28, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for the Parties to try to resolve the matter.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Gomez.
